title: anubias barteri var. nana
intro: Anubias barteri var. nana, commonly known as dwarf Anubias or dwarf African flower, is a small, slow-growing aquatic plant species belonging to the Arum family. Traditionally, the rhizomes of Anubias barteri var. nana have been used in African folk medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Anubias barteri var. nana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
